'''zasoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilnut|oilnut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilnut|oilnut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zasoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæseteth|zæseteth]] || [[word:zæsetej|zæsetej]] || [[word:zæsetesh|zæsetesh]] || [[word:zæsete|zæsete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zasosototh|zasosototh]] || [[word:zasosotoj|zasosotoj]] || [[word:zasosotosh|zasosotosh]] || [[word:zasosoto|zasosoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zasototh|zasototh]] || [[word:zasotoj|zasotoj]] || [[word:zasotosh|zasotosh]] || [[word:zasoto|zasoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zasoftoth|zasoftoth]] || [[word:zasoftoj|zasoftoj]] || [[word:zasoftosh|zasoftosh]] || [[word:zasoftof|zasoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zasototho|zasototho]] || [[word:zasotojo|zasotojo]] || [[word:zasotosho|zasotosho]] || [[word:zasotoko|zasotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zasototh|zasototh]] || [[word:zasotoj|zasotoj]] || [[word:zasotosh|zasotosh]] || [[word:zasoto|zasoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zasotothol|zasotothol]] || [[word:zasotojol|zasotojol]] || [[word:zasotoshol|zasotoshol]] || [[word:zasotokol|zasotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zasotothotho|zasotothotho]] || [[word:zasotojojo|zasotojojo]] || [[word:zasotoshosho|zasotoshosho]] || [[word:zasotoko|zasotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zasotothon|zasotothon]] || [[word:zasotojon|zasotojon]] || [[word:zasotoshon|zasotoshon]] || [[word:zasotokon|zasotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zasotothoro|zasotothoro]] || [[word:zasotojoro|zasotojoro]] || [[word:zasotoshoro|zasotoshoro]] || [[word:zasotokoro|zasotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
